title: Pumpkin Pie Hunger Bar
description: Changes your hunger bar to pumpkin pie (ㆆᴗㆆ)
body:
## Just a resource pack that makes your hunger bar pumpkin pie **¯\\\_(ツ)\_/¯** * Because, you know, pumpkin pie. Why not, right? ### Inspired by JMHMirror. Revitalized/edited to work with 1.20+ # More coming soon (•̀ᴗ-) #### If you like this, see my other resource packs ## Compatibility Fully compatible with AppleSkin!
Standard Adjusts colors of AppleSkin overlay to not clash with pie (tooltip is the unchanged) ### ________________________________________________________________________________________
Bright Bright option stays true to original AppleSkin overlay (find in versions) ### ________________________________________________________________________________________
*Should* work with any launcher versions 1.20.2+ * If you have issues, let me know Should *NOT* work with any versions pre-1.20.2 * hud sprites worked differently * I will not be making older versions, so... * See JMHMirror's version for 1.18 if you want ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
